caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses is positioned in front of a plain black background, wearing a light green blouse with floral embroidery and a dark necklace. She is speaking and gesturing with her hands to emphasize her points. In the initial frames, she holds her hands closer together near her waist. As the sequence progresses, she opens her hands wider and eventually brings her right hand up toward her chest. A small black lapel microphone is clipped to the center of her neckline. In the lower-left corner of the scene, a circular logo accompanied by the text "NPTEL" is visible. The background remains static throughout the clip, while the woman's facial expressions and hand movements change as she continues to speak.
